data.name: Common.ComingInPhase3
data.value: This section will be implemented in Phase 3 (Core XML generation).

data.name: Palette.NoResults
data.value: No matches. Try a different search.

data.name: Help.Footer
data.value: Press ? any time to reopen this.

data.name: Landing.Tagline
data.value: Build your Windows answer file, visually - offline and instantly.

data.name: Landing.Status
data.value: 🟧 Pre-alpha - the editor is under active development.

data.name: Landing.Wizard.Description
data.value: Step-by-step guided setup. Answer one question at a time, or start from a preset.

data.name: Landing.Advanced.Description
data.value: Full manual control. Every option in one place, with a live XML preview.

data.name: Landing.Docs.Description
data.value: Read-only reference for every autounattend.xml option, what it does and how.

data.name: Landing.Import.ComingSoon
data.value: Importing existing .xml files is coming in a later phase.

data.name: Wizard.Entry.Prompt
data.value: Pick how you want to start.

data.name: Wizard.Guided.Description
data.value: Walks you through every decision with explanations along the way.

data.name: Wizard.Presets.Description
data.value: Pick a ready-made template for a common scenario and tweak from there.

data.name: Wizard.Presets.Prompt
data.value: Pick a template to populate your configuration.

data.name: Wizard.Review.Subtitle
data.value: Verify your settings before downloading the answer file.

data.name: Wizard.Review.DownloadStub
data.value: XML generation is coming in Phase 3 - the download button is disabled for now.

data.name: Step.Language.Description
data.value: Pick the Windows display language and your country / region.

data.name: Step.Disk.Description
data.value: Choose how Windows Setup will partition the target drive (GPT / MBR, EFI size, recovery).

data.name: Step.Users.Description
data.value: Create the first account and choose the first-logon behavior.

data.name: Step.Privacy.Description
data.value: Disable data collection and tune express-settings defaults.

data.name: Step.Finish.Description
data.value: Head to the review screen to verify and download your autounattend.xml.

data.name: Preset.CleanHomePc.Description
data.value: Debloat, local account, GPT, en-US. For personal use without Microsoft account.

data.name: Preset.VmProxmox.Description
data.value: VirtIO drivers, QEMU guest agent, no bloatware. Ideal for Proxmox or KVM.

data.name: Preset.Corporate.Description
data.value: Pro edition, no first-logon, domain-ready placeholder, privacy-first defaults.

data.name: Preset.Minimal.Description
data.value: The smallest possible answer file for the fastest unattended install.

data.name: Region.DisplayLanguage.Description
data.value: The language Windows uses for its UI: Settings, File Explorer, dialogs. Setup looks for a matching language pack in the install image.

data.name: Region.InputLanguage.Description
data.value: The keyboard layout active on first boot. Independent of the display language - a user in Germany might want English UI with a German keyboard.

data.name: Region.HomeLocation.Description
data.value: Country / region code used for date, currency, and measurement formatting, plus region-aware features like the Microsoft Store.

data.name: Section.region.Subtitle
data.value: Language, keyboard, and regional formatting Windows applies on first boot.

data.name: Advanced.Subtitle
data.value: Full manual control. All options in one place. Press Ctrl+Shift+X or the floating button to preview the XML.

data.name: Section.scripts.Subtitle
data.value: Run Cmd / PowerShell / Registry / VBScript at four points during Windows Setup.

data.name: Scripts.Phase.System.Description
data.value: Runs in the SYSTEM context before any user profile exists. Use for domain join, driver install, service configuration.

data.name: Scripts.Phase.DefaultUser.Description
data.value: Edits the Default User hive so settings apply to every new profile. Only Registry, Cmd and PowerShell are allowed here.

data.name: Scripts.Phase.FirstLogon.Description
data.value: Runs once, on the very first user logon, in that user's context.

data.name: Scripts.Phase.UserOnce.Description
data.value: Runs on each user's first logon, per-user.

data.name: Scripts.Type.Cmd.Placeholder
data.value: @echo off rem Commands run as SYSTEM…

data.name: Scripts.Type.PowerShell.Placeholder
data.value: # PowerShell, runs as SYSTEM Write-Host 'Hello from preflight.xml'

data.name: Scripts.Phase.Empty
data.value: No scripts in this phase yet. Click "Add script" to create one.

data.name: Scripts.RestartExplorer.Description
data.value: Applies any shell-related registry tweaks without a reboot.

data.name: Section.wdac.Subtitle
data.value: Windows Defender Application Control - lock down which binaries can execute.

data.name: Wdac.Mode.Description
data.value: Choose "Not configured" to skip WDAC entirely, or "Basic" to deploy a built-in policy allowing Windows, Program Files and Program Files (x86), with known write-able folders denied.

data.name: Wdac.Enforcement.Description
data.value: Audit logs violations without blocking, "Enforce" blocks. Only applies when Mode = Basic policy.

data.name: Wdac.ScriptEnforcement.Description
data.value: "Restricted" blocks untrusted PowerShell/VBScript; "Unrestricted" lets them run.

data.name: Section.applocker.Subtitle
data.value: Paste a custom AppLocker policy XML to deploy at first boot.

data.name: AppLocker.Mode.Description
data.value: "Not configured" skips AppLocker. "Custom XML" deploys the policy you paste below; it's validated against Microsoft's schema at generation time.

data.name: AppLocker.PolicyXml.Description
data.value: An AppLockerPolicy document. Invalid XML is reported in the generated autounattend as a comment.

data.name: Section.components.Subtitle
data.value: Inject raw autounattend.xml fragments into chosen components.

data.name: Components.Help
data.value: For each slot, pick a component + pass combination and paste the child XML that should appear inside the <component> element. Leave slots empty to skip.

data.name: Section.tweaks.Subtitle
data.value: Registry-level polish applied at first boot: Explorer defaults, Edge behaviour, performance tweaks.

data.name: Tweaks.ShowAllTrayIcons.Label
data.value: Show all icons in the notification area

data.name: Tweaks.HideTaskViewButton.Label
data.value: Hide the Task View button from the taskbar

data.name: Tweaks.ShowEndTask.Label
data.value: Enable "End task" in the taskbar right-click menu

data.name: Tweaks.HideInfoTip.Label
data.value: Hide Explorer tooltips for files and folders

data.name: Tweaks.HardenSystemDriveAcl.Label
data.value: Harden the C:\ ACL (remove Authenticated Users)

data.name: Tweaks.AllowPowerShellScripts.Label
data.value: Set PowerShell execution policy to RemoteSigned

data.name: Tweaks.PreventAutomaticReboot.Label
data.value: Prevent automatic reboot after Windows Update

data.name: Tweaks.DisableAppSuggestions.Label
data.value: Disable suggested apps and ads in Start

data.name: Tweaks.DisableBingResults.Label
data.value: Hide Bing search results in the Start menu

data.name: Tweaks.DisableAutomaticRestartSignOn.Label
data.value: Disable automatic sign-in after a restart

data.name: Tweaks.DisableWpbt.Label
data.value: Disable Windows Platform Binary Table execution

data.name: Section.vm-support.Subtitle
data.value: Install guest tools automatically when the target is a virtual machine.

data.name: VmSupport.VirtualBoxGuestAdditions.Description
data.value: Downloads and installs Oracle's Guest Additions: seamless mouse, clipboard, shared folders.

data.name: VmSupport.VmwareTools.Description
data.value: Downloads and installs VMware's guest tools: paravirtual drivers, clipboard, resolution sync.

data.name: VmSupport.VirtIoAndQemuAgent.Label
data.value: Install VirtIO drivers and QEMU guest agent

data.name: VmSupport.VirtIoAndQemuAgent.Description
data.value: For Proxmox / KVM: installs the signed VirtIO drivers and qemu-guest-agent service at first logon.

data.name: VmSupport.ParallelsTools.Description
data.value: Installs Parallels' integration tools: coherence mode, clipboard, shared folders.

data.name: Section.express-settings.Subtitle
data.value: Control the "Express settings" screen shown during Windows out-of-box setup.

data.name: ExpressSettings.Mode.Description
data.value: Decide whether Setup asks about express settings, accepts all defaults, or opts out of all of them.

data.name: Section.lock-keys.Subtitle
data.value: Configure Caps Lock, Num Lock, and Scroll Lock initial state and whether the physical key is active.

data.name: LockKeys.CapsLock.Lock.Label
data.value: Disable the Caps Lock key (ignore scancode)

data.name: LockKeys.NumLock.Lock.Label
data.value: Disable the Num Lock key (ignore scancode)

data.name: LockKeys.ScrollLock.Lock.Label
data.value: Disable the Scroll Lock key (ignore scancode)

data.name: Section.sticky-keys.Subtitle
data.value: Control the Sticky Keys accessibility feature and its hotkey prompt.

data.name: StickyKeys.Mode.Disable
data.value: Disable Sticky Keys and its hotkey prompt

data.name: StickyKeys.Indicator.Label
data.value: Show status indicator in the taskbar

data.name: StickyKeys.TwoKeysOff.Label
data.value: Turn off Sticky Keys when two keys are pressed together

data.name: StickyKeys.AudibleFeedback.Label
data.value: Play a sound when a modifier is latched

data.name: StickyKeys.HotKeySound.Label
data.value: Play a sound when the hotkey toggles Sticky Keys

data.name: Docs.Subtitle
data.value: Read-only reference for every autounattend.xml option covered by preflight.xml.

data.name: Docs.Entry.ComingSoon
data.value: Detailed documentation for this topic is coming in a later phase.

data.name: Docs.Entry.UnknownDescription
data.value: The topic you requested does not exist.

data.name: Docs.Topic.Region.Description
data.value: Display language, input locale, home location, time zone.

data.name: Docs.Topic.Disk.Description
data.value: GPT vs. MBR, EFI size, recovery partition, custom diskpart scripts.

data.name: Docs.Topic.Users.Description
data.value: Local accounts, admin groups, first-logon behaviour, password policy.

data.name: Docs.Topic.Edition.Description
data.value: Product keys, edition selection (Home / Pro / Enterprise / Education).

data.name: Docs.Topic.Privacy.Description
data.value: Express settings, telemetry toggles, advertising ID, location services.

data.name: Docs.Topic.Security.Description
data.value: UAC, Defender, SmartScreen, RDP, Windows 11 requirement bypass.

data.name: Docs.Topic.Bloatware.Description
data.value: Remove preinstalled apps: Copilot, Cortana, Bing Search, Teams and more.

data.name: Docs.Topic.Tweaks.Description
data.value: File Explorer, taskbar, start menu, visual effects, long paths.

data.name: Docs.Topic.Vm.Description
data.value: VirtualBox Guest Additions, VMware Tools, VirtIO + QEMU agent, Parallels Tools.

data.name: NotFound.Message
data.value: The page you are looking for does not exist.

data.name: Section.bloatware.Subtitle
data.value: Remove preinstalled apps - Copilot, Cortana, Bing search, Teams, widgets and other bundled stock.

data.name: Section.compact-os.Subtitle
data.value: Whether Windows keeps its files in the compressed WIMBOOT layout after install.

data.name: Section.computer-name.Subtitle
data.value: Randomly generated or fixed hostname for the installed machine.

data.name: Section.desktop-icons.Subtitle
data.value: Which shortcuts Windows shows on the desktop for every new profile.

data.name: Section.disk.Subtitle
data.value: GPT vs. MBR, EFI size, recovery partition, custom diskpart scripts.

data.name: Section.edition.Subtitle
data.value: Product key handling and which Windows edition Setup installs.

data.name: Section.explorer.Subtitle
data.value: File Explorer and shell defaults: hidden files, extensions, context menu, tooltips.

data.name: Section.start-folders.Subtitle
data.value: Which folder shortcuts appear next to the power button in the Windows 11 Start menu.

data.name: Section.network.Subtitle
data.value: Wi-Fi behaviour during OOBE: ask interactively, skip, pre-configure or inject a profile XML.

data.name: Section.processor-archs.Subtitle
data.value: Which processor architectures the generated autounattend.xml targets.

data.name: Section.setup-settings.Subtitle
data.value: Setup-time toggles: Windows 11 requirement bypass, OOBE tweaks, PowerShell window visibility.

data.name: Section.source-image.Subtitle
data.value: Which image inside install.wim Setup picks - automatic, by index, or by name.

data.name: Section.start-menu.Subtitle
data.value: Taskbar search, tray icons, widgets, pinned tiles and Start-menu pins.

data.name: Section.time-zone.Subtitle
data.value: Time zone Windows applies on first boot.

data.name: Section.users.Subtitle
data.value: Local accounts, admin groups, first-logon behaviour, autologon.

data.name: Section.visual-effects.Subtitle
data.value: Animation / shadow / transparency preset (or hand-picked subset).

data.name: Section.windows-pe.Subtitle
data.value: What Windows PE does before install: default, generated diskpart, or custom cmd script.

data.name: SourceImage.Mode.Description
data.value: How Setup picks an image inside install.wim: the first one, a fixed index, or a name match.

data.name: SourceImage.ImageIndex.Description
data.value: 1-based position of the image inside install.wim.

data.name: SourceImage.ImageName.Description
data.value: Exact image name as it appears in install.wim (e.g. "Windows 11 Pro").

data.name: CompactOs.Mode.Description
data.value: Default follows Windows' own heuristic (small disks only). Enabled always compresses, Disabled never does.

data.name: DesktopIcons.Mode.Description
data.value: Default leaves Windows' choices alone. Specific pins an exact set from the list below.

data.name: DesktopIcons.DeleteEdge.Label
data.value: Delete the Microsoft Edge desktop icon

data.name: DesktopIcons.DeleteEdge.Description
data.value: Removes the Edge shortcut for every new user profile.

data.name: Disk.Mode.Description
data.value: Interactive lets Setup ask, AutoWipe formats the first disk silently, CustomScript runs your own diskpart script.

data.name: Disk.PartitionStyle.Description
data.value: GPT is required for modern UEFI systems and Windows 11. MBR is legacy BIOS only.

data.name: Disk.EspSize.Description
data.value: Size of the ESP in megabytes. 300 is Microsoft's default, 100-512 is the usual range.

data.name: Disk.Recovery.Description
data.value: Where Windows puts WinRE. A dedicated partition is the default; folder saves space; none skips WinRE entirely.

data.name: Disk.RecoverySize.Description
data.value: Size of the dedicated recovery partition. 990 MB is the Windows 11 default.

data.name: Disk.CustomScript.Description
data.value: Only used when Disk mode is "Custom diskpart script". Your script replaces the default partitioning logic.

data.name: Disk.InstallDiskIndex.Description
data.value: Zero-based disk index Setup writes Windows to. 0 is the first physical disk.

data.name: Disk.InstallPartitionIndex.Description
data.value: 1-based partition index on the chosen disk. Ignored for AutoWipe mode.

data.name: Edition.KeyMode.Description
data.value: Generic uses Microsoft's edition-switch keys. Custom embeds your key. Interactive prompts Setup. FromBios reads the key from UEFI / MSDM.

data.name: Edition.ProductKey.Description
data.value: 25-character product key. Only used when "Custom key" is selected.

data.name: Edition.Edition.Description
data.value: Which Windows edition Setup installs. Must be available inside the source install.wim.

data.name: Explorer.HideFiles.Description
data.value: Controls whether Explorer shows hidden and OS-protected files.

data.name: Explorer.ClassicContextMenu.Description
data.value: Brings back the Windows 10 full right-click menu instead of the Windows 11 condensed one.

data.name: Explorer.ShowFileExtensions.Description
data.value: Always reveal extensions like .exe or .docx in Explorer.

data.name: Explorer.HideInfoTip.Description
data.value: Suppress the hover tooltips on files and folders.

data.name: Explorer.LaunchToThisPC.Description
data.value: New Explorer windows start at This PC instead of Quick Access.

data.name: Explorer.ShowEndTask.Label
data.value: Enable "End task" in the taskbar menu

data.name: Explorer.ShowEndTask.Description
data.value: Adds an End task entry to the right-click menu of running apps in the taskbar.

data.name: Network.WifiMode.Description
data.value: Interactive prompts the user. Skip bypasses the screen entirely. Configure embeds an SSID + password. ProfileXml injects a full Windows Wi-Fi profile.

data.name: Network.ProfileXml.Description
data.value: Paste the output of "netsh wlan export profile". Credentials will be embedded in autounattend.xml.

data.name: Personalization.Colors.Subtitle
data.value: System / app theme, accent colour, taskbar translucency.

data.name: Personalization.Colors.AccentColor.Description
data.value: Hex value (e.g. #0078D4). Used wherever Windows shows the accent colour.

data.name: Personalization.Colors.AccentOnTitleBars.Label
data.value: Apply accent to window title bars

data.name: Personalization.Wallpaper.Subtitle
data.value: Default image, solid colour, or a custom script.

data.name: Personalization.Wallpaper.SolidColor.Description
data.value: Hex colour used as a full-screen solid wallpaper.

data.name: Personalization.Wallpaper.Script.Description
data.value: Cmd / PowerShell that copies or downloads the wallpaper file and applies it.

data.name: Personalization.LockScreen.Subtitle
data.value: Default Windows image or a custom-scripted one.

data.name: Personalization.LockScreen.Script.Description
data.value: Cmd / PowerShell that sets the lock-screen image at first boot.

data.name: ProcessorArchs.Architectures.Description
data.value: Which CPU architectures the generated autounattend.xml has component entries for. Pick at least one.

data.name: Setup.BypassRequirementsCheck.Description
data.value: Skip the TPM 2.0, Secure Boot, CPU and RAM checks so Setup runs on unsupported hardware.

data.name: Setup.BypassNetworkCheck.Description
data.value: Allow completing OOBE offline, without a Microsoft account prompt.

data.name: Setup.UseConfigurationSet.Description
data.value: Split autounattend into one main file + per-pass side files. Only needed for advanced deployments.

data.name: Setup.HidePowerShellWindows.Description
data.value: Run first-boot scripts silently instead of flashing a console.

data.name: Setup.KeepSensitiveFiles.Label
data.value: Keep autounattend.xml on disk after install

data.name: Setup.KeepSensitiveFiles.Description
data.value: By default, Windows deletes the answer file. Disabling this leaves credentials readable - do NOT ship images this way.

data.name: Setup.UseNarrator.Description
data.value: Useful for imaging kiosks and accessibility setups.

data.name: StartMenu.TaskbarSearch.Description
data.value: How the search control is displayed next to Start.

data.name: StartMenu.TaskbarIcons.Description
data.value: Default keeps Windows' pins, RemoveAll clears them, CustomXml deploys your own layout.

data.name: StartMenu.DisableWidgets.Description
data.value: Removes the Widgets entry from the taskbar.

data.name: StartMenu.LeftTaskbar.Description
data.value: Pin taskbar icons to the left instead of centering them.

data.name: StartMenu.HideTaskViewButton.Description
data.value: Removes the virtual-desktop switcher icon from the taskbar.

data.name: StartMenu.ShowAllTrayIcons.Description
data.value: Always expand the notification area instead of hiding overflow icons.

data.name: StartMenu.DisableBingResults.Label
data.value: Hide Bing results in Start search

data.name: StartMenu.DisableBingResults.Description
data.value: Stops the Start menu from mixing web results into local search.

data.name: StartMenu.StartTiles.Description
data.value: Only relevant on Windows 10. Default keeps the shipped tiles, RemoveAll clears them, CustomXml deploys a StartLayout XML.

data.name: StartMenu.StartPins.Description
data.value: Default keeps Microsoft's pins, RemoveAll empties the Pinned area, CustomJson deploys your own start2.json.

data.name: StartFolders.Mode.Description
data.value: Default follows Windows. Specific pins exactly the set you tick below.

data.name: VisualEffects.Preset.Description
data.value: Pick a stock SystemPropertiesPerformance preset, or Custom to hand-toggle each effect.

data.name: Users.Accounts.Description
data.value: One row per account Setup creates. At least one account should be an administrator.

data.name: Users.Accounts.Empty
data.value: No accounts yet. Add one below or pick a preset.

data.name: Users.FirstLogon.Description
data.value: Which account (if any) logs in automatically the first time Windows boots.

data.name: Users.FirstLogon.Obscure.Description
data.value: Base64-encode so casual readers don't see it. Still trivially recoverable - do not treat as security.

data.name: Users.FirstLogon.PromptMsa
data.value: Show the Microsoft account sign-in prompt in OOBE

data.name: Users.FirstLogon.PromptLocal
data.value: Show the local-account creation prompt in OOBE

data.name: Users.FirstLogon.PromptHint
data.value: Both prompts apply only when first logon is set to "Do not log anyone in".

data.name: Users.Expiration.Description
data.value: How long local account passwords stay valid.

data.name: Users.Lockout.Description
data.value: How Windows responds to a run of failed sign-ins.

data.name: Users.Lockout.Disabled.Warning
data.value: With lockout disabled, brute-force attempts against a local account are effectively unlimited.

data.name: Users.Lockout.WindowHint
data.value: The window is the time over which bad attempts are counted; the duration is how long the account stays locked.

data.name: ComputerName.Mode.Description
data.value: Random picks a fresh hostname each boot, Manual uses the exact value below, Script runs your generator.

data.name: ComputerName.Script.Description
data.value: Cmd / PowerShell that writes the chosen hostname to the expected registry value.

data.name: TimeZone.Mode.Description
data.value: Implicit uses the region's default time zone. Explicit pins the specific zone below.

data.name: DesktopIcons.VisibleIcons.Description
data.value: Tick the icons Windows should show on the desktop. Unticked entries are hidden.

data.name: StartFolders.VisibleFolders.Description
data.value: Tick which folder shortcuts appear next to the power button.

data.name: Section.personalization.Subtitle
data.value: Theme, wallpaper and lock-screen overrides applied at first boot.

data.name: VisualEffects.CustomEffects.Description
data.value: Tick each effect you want enabled. Unticked effects are explicitly disabled.

data.name: VisualEffects.Effect.ControlAnimations
data.value: Animate controls and elements inside windows

data.name: VisualEffects.Effect.AnimateMinMax
data.value: Animate windows when minimizing and maximizing

data.name: VisualEffects.Effect.MenuAnimation
data.value: Fade or slide menus into view

data.name: VisualEffects.Effect.TooltipAnimation
data.value: Fade or slide tooltips into view

data.name: VisualEffects.Effect.SelectionFade
data.value: Fade out menu items after clicking

data.name: VisualEffects.Effect.DropShadow
data.value: Drop shadow on desktop icon labels

data.name: Landing.Import.Partial
data.value: Partial import from {0} — some sections defaulted.

data.name: Pe.Mode.Description
data.value: Default uses the built-in PE pass. Generated writes diskpart + partitioning for you. Custom runs the cmd script you supply.

data.name: Pe.Disable8Dot3.Description
data.value: Speeds up filesystem metadata at the cost of compatibility with 16-bit / very old apps.

data.name: Pe.PauseBeforePartition.Description
data.value: Drops to a cmd prompt just before Setup touches the disk - useful for debugging images.

data.name: Pe.PauseBeforeReboot.Label
data.value: Pause before rebooting out of PE

data.name: Pe.PauseBeforeReboot.Description
data.value: Drops to a cmd prompt after the PE pass finishes but before the first reboot.

data.name: Pe.CustomCmd.Description
data.value: Only used when PE mode is "Custom cmd script". Must end with an exit that is understood by Setup.

data.name: Pe.CustomCmd.Placeholder
